description: For the one who's already run seventeen scenarios. Your card announces the condition before you say a word. Stick it on your debit card and let every tap at the counter be a confession. Vinyl card sticker. Sized to fit standard debit/credit card.

For the one who acts like it even when it's not true. Your debit card is the last object that should look humble. This sticker makes sure it doesn't. Works equally well if you're actually rich or just committed to the energy. Vinyl card sticker. Sized to fit standard debit/credit card.

For the one who sees something good and acts on it. You've said it. You've thought it. Now it's on your card, which is the most accurate surface for it. Every time you tap, it's an honest transaction. Vinyl card sticker. Sized to fit standard debit/credit card.

For the one whose hunger is a personality trait. Not just hungry. Always. It's a condition, a warning, a declaration. This keychain goes on the bag of someone whose friends already know to keep snacks on them. UV-printed acrylic keychain, printed both sides. Metal split ring.

For the one who needed exactly two seconds of convincing. Peer pressure is overrated as a concept. Sometimes your friends suggest a beer and it sounds right and you go. This keychain is for the person who clips their priorities on their bag. UV-printed acrylic keychain, printed both sides. Metal split ring.

For the one who still believes this, genuinely. Not ironic. Sincere. These earrings are for the person who organizes their life around this idea and turns out to be right about it. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.
For the one who doesn't wait to be told she's in charge. Not a job title. A mode. These earrings go on before the meeting, not after the promotion. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one with a very low tolerance for nonsense. She has a limited number of hours in the day and cannot spend them on nonsense. These earrings are the warning label. Functional, accurate, and saves everyone time. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the cat person who has studied the philosophy. Balance, duality, chaos — all in cat form. These earrings are for the person whose cat has knocked something off a shelf today and they're completely fine with it. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one whose mornings start at the second cup. The day didn't click until the cup was in hand. These earrings are for the person who has given coffee legitimate credit in their life story. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the dog parent who needs no other explanation. Simple. True. Dogs go woof. These earrings are for the person who describes their life in terms of before and after getting their dog — and means it. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.
For the one who has accepted what this all is. The chaos isn't stopping. At some point the only move is to sit back and find it fascinating. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who doesn't mean to but keeps doing it. Not malicious. Just magnetic. These earrings are for the person who owns the fact instead of being dramatic about it. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who already knows. Self-aware confidence looks good on earrings. Wear them when you want the room to catch up to what you already know about yourself. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who knows that both things sting a little. Ice cream and love — both good, both occasionally bite. These earrings hold the whole feeling: sweet, slightly painful, worth it anyway. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.
For the one who has had enough of certain people. If only it worked. But it's on the ears, it's visible, and it tells the right people what you're about. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who checks the numbers. You post, you wait, you refresh. These earrings are for the person who knows the exact architecture of the validation loop and has decided to wear it instead of pretending it doesn't exist. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one trying to shift the ratio. The panic is there. It exists. But the goal is to increase the disco. These earrings are the instruction written on the ears — a reminder every time you look in the mirror. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the person who's made peace with no. One syllable. Complete sentence. These earrings say the whole thing so you don't have to. Wear them to the meeting where someone will definitely ask you to do something unreasonable. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who has one word for everything she approves of. Noice. That's it. That's the whole message. The earrings say it so the person wearing them doesn't have to repeat it all day — it's already handled. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one collecting receipts and moving on with style. The premium version. Not just boy tears — the good kind, bottled, labeled. These earrings go to someone who has turned a bad experience into an excellent attitude. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who has a specific person in mind right now. You don't need to say it out loud. The earrings are already saying it. For the day you got the win, or the day after, or honestly any Tuesday. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who is ready to be taken somewhere good. The name does double duty — the song energy and the direct request. Either way, these are for someone who wants things to happen and isn't being quiet about it. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who hasn't booked the trip yet but plans to. The vacation exists in the bottle — portable, in your control, already there in some form. Wear the feeling before the flight. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the one who carries everywhere with them. The whole world, contained. These earrings are for the person who brings their whole self to every room and makes it feel like the world came with them. Laser-cut UV-printed acrylic earrings.

For the cat person who relates to every sleeping cat photo. The club has exactly one requirement. If your cat is always asleep and you are also often asleep, you're both already members. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the one who is exhausted and has been for a while. Not just tired right now. Always. It's a state of being, not a symptom. This magnet on the fridge is the first honest thing you see in the morning. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one whose social obligations are mostly beverage-related. This is the fridge magnet that belongs on the fridge, which is where the pressure happens. Accurate, a little funny, good gift. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one with a to-read pile that qualifies as furniture. Not a reader. A bibliophile. There's a difference and it matters to them. This magnet goes on the fridge of someone who organizes their bookshelves by vibe and owns it completely. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who has earned these. Earned, collected, displayed. This magnet is the trophy that requires no explanation to the right person. A fridge is the correct home for this energy. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who takes fire everywhere they go. The camping lighter is an attitude object — carry it because you're the one who has what you need. This magnet is for that person: always prepared, slightly reckless, good at fires. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the cat owner who knows exactly what that look means. The fishbowl, the cat, the exact configuration of desire and containment. This magnet is for the person who writes inner monologues for their cat. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the one who owns the title. It used to be an insult. Now it's an identity. This magnet is for the fridge that already has individual photos of each cat. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the skeptic in a world of manifesting. You've seen the crystals. You've heard the explanations. You remain unconvinced. This magnet is for the person who loves their wellness-obsessed friend anyway. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the dog parent who runs the most important review past one audience. If the dog likes you, you're in. This magnet is for the person who applies the dog approval test to every decision and has made their life better for it. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the one who needs a playlist for exactly this. Some days you don't want to be cheered up. You want the right playlist for the mood you're in. This magnet is for the person who has made that playlist before and will make it again. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who is always looking for the next thing. Not as a hashtag — as a disposition. This magnet is for the person who turns "let's try something new" into a lifestyle. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who brings heat to every situation. Not just a lighter. A fierce one. The energy is the point — carry fire and carry it with intention. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.
For the one who schedules everything around meals. Priorities are priorities. The fridge is the appropriate home for this declaration. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who has made peace with their own company. Not sad. Just accurate, and owned. This magnet is for the person who has stopped pretending they're not fine with staying in. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who knows this from experience. Sometimes love bites — the Def Leppard version and the honest version are both true. This magnet is for the person who has felt both and still shows up for it. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who has feelings about Monday mornings. You know exactly what this means. The magnet goes on the fridge and you see it on Sunday night, which is when it becomes relevant. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one with three shows going at once. Not a casual viewer. A professional. There's a system, there's a queue, there's a rating system for every ending. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who finally figured out the ingredient. Everything goes better with it. The sauce is the whole thing. This magnet is a fridge reminder that the work is ongoing. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one managing their own chemistry. If only it came in a spray bottle. This magnet is for the person who has a very practical relationship with their own moods — treating the problem directly, or at least naming it with appropriate humor. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the one who has stopped asking why. Sometimes the explanation is not available and the only reasonable response is this. The magnet is a daily reminder that you're not obligated to make sense of everything. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the cat person whose cat models their ideal lifestyle. The cat has it figured out — nap when required, operate on own schedule, require no justification. This magnet is a tribute to the philosophy. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the one whose shoe rack is the most organized room in the house. The collection isn't a hobby, it's a commitment. This magnet says what the shelf display already shows. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one running on empty in the best possible way. The supply ran out. There's no resupply scheduled. This magnet is for the person who has passed through caring what everyone thinks and arrived somewhere calmer. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who is always half-packed. The backpack is the lifestyle object for a specific kind of person — always ready to go, considers the airport comfortable territory. Their fridge already has magnets from three countries. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the one who needs the ocean to function properly. The prescription exists and it's the sea. Some people just work better by water. The fridge confirms what everyone already knows about them. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the one who put up a very effective wall. Standard operating procedure: don't feel things. Then this magnet arrives as a reminder that the warning was already there. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the one who has done the dance at least once, unprompted. It's a reference, it's an era, it's on a fridge now. Get this for someone who still laughs when they hear it. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the dog household where this is the loudest voice. Two woofs. The whole thing. This magnet is for the fridge of someone whose dog greets them at the door every day and makes the entire commute home worth it. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing (15–20mm).

For the one keeping it together while everything else isn't. The news is what it is. The world does what it does. You still made your bed this morning, which is not nothing. UV-printed acrylic fridge magnet. Neodymium magnet backing.

For the person everyone tells to calm down. You've heard the advice. You've decided to carry it as an accessory instead. A keychain that's also a prescription — and honestly, the only one that works. UV-printed acrylic keychain. Metal split ring.

For the cat person who is barely holding it together. Cat energy. Anxiety energy. Both at once, on your keys. The kind of thing that makes you laugh in a bad week, which is the only thing it needs to do. UV-printed acrylic keychain. Metal split ring.

For the one who stops for every dog they see on the street. The distraction is documented and non-negotiable. This keychain goes on the bag of the person who has called petting a stranger's dog the best part of their day — because it was. UV-printed acrylic keychain. Metal split ring.

For the one who has stopped fighting the chaos. The situation is not improving. But you're still here, keys in hand, and at some point that becomes an act of watching. Carry this and let it describe your general life situation. UV-printed acrylic keychain. Metal split ring.

For the one who doesn't need the reminder but likes having it. It's on your keys. Which means it's also on the table, on the counter, on every surface you set your bag down on. Not subtle. That's the point. UV-printed acrylic keychain. Metal split ring.

For the one who forgot to keep their guard up. You were doing fine. Then something happened and now there are feelings. This keychain is the warning label you should have had on the situation. UV-printed acrylic keychain. Metal split ring.

For the one whose muscle memory is in those four keys. W, A, S, D. If you know, you know. If you don't, this keychain isn't for you. Clip it on your bag and let it do the filtering at the party. UV-printed acrylic keychain. Metal split ring.

For the one who never turns down a round. Peer pressure is overstated. Sometimes you just want a beer and needed someone to suggest it. Wear it on your jacket and stop explaining yourself at every outing. UV-printed acrylic lapel pin. 1"×1" (25mm). Rubber clutch back.

For the one who always finds the back door. The smoking area has its own social contract — better conversation, less pretense, shorter sentences. This pin is the membership badge. You know exactly who wears this. UV-printed acrylic lapel pin. 1"×1" (25mm). Rubber clutch back.

For the one whose 11pm productivity is mostly snacks. Late nights, open tabs, something crunchy nearby. The munchies sticker goes on the laptop because that's where the condition happens. Die-cut premium vinyl laptop sticker. Digital print.

For the one who's riffed on this phrase at least once. The format is a classic — everyone's made a version of it. This one stays on your laptop because it's yours to fill in. The sticker says something. What it says depends on who's reading it next to your life. Die-cut premium vinyl laptop sticker. Digital print.

For the one who left every last one behind. The sticker goes on whatever surface needs to know — your laptop, your water bottle, your notebook. This travels with you and tells the room about your current reserves. Printed vinyl pop-up sticker.
